fewShots.question: How many encounters are in each readmission risk category?
fewShots.query: SELECT readmission_risk_category, COUNT(*) as encounter_count FROM fact_encounter GROUP BY readmission_risk_category ORDER BY encounter_count DESC

fewShots.question: What is the distribution of readmission risk?
fewShots.query: SELECT readmission_risk_category, COUNT(*) as encounter_count, CAST(COUNT(*) AS FLOAT) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fact_encounter) * 100 as pct FROM fact_encounter GROUP BY readmission_risk_category ORDER BY encounter_count DESC

fewShots.question: Show me the top 10 patients with highest readmission risk scores
fewShots.query: SELECT TOP 10 dp.first_name, dp.last_name, dp.age, fe.encounter_id, fe.encounter_type, fe.readmission_risk_score, fe.readmission_risk_category, fe.length_of_stay, fe.discharge_disposition FROM fact_encounter fe JOIN dim_patient dp ON fe.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 ORDER BY fe.readmission_risk_score DESC

fewShots.question: List patients with high readmission risk scores above 0.7
fewShots.query: SELECT dp.first_name, dp.last_name, dp.age, dp.age_group, fe.encounter_id, fe.encounter_type, fe.discharge_disposition, fe.readmission_risk_score, fe.readmission_risk_category, fe.length_of_stay FROM fact_encounter fe JOIN dim_patient dp ON fe.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 WHERE fe.readmission_risk_score > 0.7 ORDER BY fe.readmission_risk_score DESC

fewShots.question: List patients with high readmission risk
fewShots.query: SELECT dp.first_name, dp.last_name, dp.age, dp.age_group, fe.encounter_id, fe.encounter_type, fe.discharge_disposition, fe.readmission_risk_score, fe.readmission_risk_category, fe.length_of_stay FROM fact_encounter fe JOIN dim_patient dp ON fe.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 WHERE fe.readmission_risk_category = 'High' ORDER BY fe.readmission_risk_score DESC

fewShots.question: What is the average readmission risk score by encounter type?
fewShots.query: SELECT encounter_type, COUNT(*) as total_encounters, AVG(readmission_risk_score) as avg_risk_score, SUM(CASE WHEN readmission_risk_category = 'High' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as high_risk_count, SUM(readmission_flag) as actual_readmissions FROM fact_encounter GROUP BY encounter_type ORDER BY avg_risk_score DESC

fewShots.question: What is our current readmission rate?
fewShots.query: SELECT SUM(total_encounters) AS eligible_discharges, SUM(actual_readmissions) AS readmissions, CAST(SUM(actual_readmissions) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(total_encounters), 0) * 100 AS readmission_rate_pct FROM agg_readmission_by_date

fewShots.question: Show me readmission trends by month
fewShots.query: SELECT dd.month_name, dd.year, dd.month_number, SUM(ar.total_encounters) as total_encounters, SUM(ar.actual_readmissions) as readmissions, CAST(SUM(ar.actual_readmissions) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(ar.total_encounters), 0) * 100 as readmission_rate_pct FROM agg_readmission_by_date ar JOIN dim_date dd ON ar.encounter_date_key = dd.date_key GROUP BY dd.month_name, dd.year, dd.month_number ORDER BY dd.year, dd.month_number

fewShots.question: Which encounter types have the highest readmission rates?
fewShots.query: SELECT encounter_type, SUM(total_encounters) as total_encounters, SUM(actual_readmissions) as readmissions, CAST(SUM(actual_readmissions) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(total_encounters), 0) * 100 as readmission_rate_pct, AVG(avg_risk_score) as avg_risk_score FROM agg_readmission_by_date GROUP BY encounter_type ORDER BY readmission_rate_pct DESC

fewShots.question: What is our overall denial rate?
fewShots.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_claims, COUNT(CASE WHEN denial_flag = 1 THEN 1 END) as total_denials, CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN denial_flag = 1 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100 as denial_rate_pct, SUM(CASE WHEN denial_flag = 1 THEN billed_amount ELSE 0 END) as denied_dollars, SUM(billed_amount) as total_billed FROM fact_claim

fewShots.question: Show me the top 10 highest-value denied claims with patient names
fewShots.query: SELECT TOP 10 fc.claim_id, dp.first_name, dp.last_name, py.payer_name, fc.billed_amount, fc.primary_denial_reason, fc.recommended_action FROM fact_claim fc JOIN dim_patient dp ON fc.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 JOIN dim_payer py ON fc.payer_key = py.payer_key WHERE fc.denial_flag = 1 ORDER BY fc.billed_amount DESC

fewShots.question: Show me claims with high denial risk that are still pending
fewShots.query: SELECT fc.claim_id, dp.first_name, dp.last_name, py.payer_name, fc.billed_amount, fc.denial_risk_score, fc.recommended_action FROM fact_claim fc JOIN dim_patient dp ON fc.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 JOIN dim_payer py ON fc.payer_key = py.payer_key WHERE fc.denial_risk_category = 'High' AND fc.claim_status = 'Pending' ORDER BY fc.denial_risk_score DESC

fewShots.question: Show me denial rates by payer
fewShots.query: SELECT py.payer_name, py.payer_type, COUNT(*) as total_claims, COUNT(CASE WHEN fc.denial_flag = 1 THEN 1 END) as denied_claims, CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN fc.denial_flag = 1 THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100 as denial_rate_pct, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.denial_flag = 1 THEN fc.billed_amount ELSE 0 END) as denied_dollars FROM fact_claim fc JOIN dim_payer py ON fc.payer_key = py.payer_key GROUP BY py.payer_name, py.payer_type ORDER BY denial_rate_pct DESC

fewShots.question: What are the top denial reasons and their financial impact?
fewShots.query: SELECT primary_denial_reason, COUNT(*) as denial_count, SUM(billed_amount) as total_billed_amount, AVG(billed_amount) as avg_claim_amount FROM fact_claim WHERE denial_flag = 1 GROUP BY primary_denial_reason ORDER BY denial_count DESC

fewShots.question: Which encounters are linked to denied claims?
fewShots.query: SELECT TOP 20 fc.claim_id, fe.encounter_id, fe.encounter_type, fe.discharge_disposition, fe.length_of_stay, dp.first_name, dp.last_name, fc.billed_amount, fc.claim_status, fc.primary_denial_reason FROM fact_claim fc JOIN fact_encounter fe ON fc.encounter_key = fe.encounter_key JOIN dim_patient dp ON fc.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 WHERE fc.denial_flag = 1 ORDER BY fc.billed_amount DESC

fewShots.question: Show me denied claims with their primary diagnosis
fewShots.query: SELECT TOP 20 fc.claim_id, dp.first_name, dp.last_name, dd_diag.icd_code, dd_diag.icd_description, fc.billed_amount, fc.primary_denial_reason, fe.encounter_type, fe.length_of_stay FROM fact_claim fc JOIN fact_encounter fe ON fc.encounter_key = fe.encounter_key JOIN fact_diagnosis fd ON fe.encounter_key = fd.encounter_key AND fd.diagnosis_type = 'principal' JOIN dim_diagnosis dd_diag ON fd.diagnosis_key = dd_diag.diagnosis_key JOIN dim_patient dp ON fc.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 WHERE fc.denial_flag = 1 ORDER BY fc.billed_amount DESC

fewShots.question: How many claims are in each denial risk category?
fewShots.query: SELECT denial_risk_category, COUNT(*) as claim_count, SUM(billed_amount) as total_billed, AVG(denial_risk_score) as avg_risk_score FROM fact_claim GROUP BY denial_risk_category ORDER BY claim_count DESC

fewShots.question: Which providers have the most denied claims? Show me names, counts, and denial rates
fewShots.query: SELECT dpr.display_name, dpr.specialty, COUNT(*) as total_claims, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.denial_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as denial_count, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN fc.denial_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100 as denial_rate_pct, SUM(CASE WHEN fc.denial_flag = 1 THEN fc.billed_amount ELSE 0 END) as denied_amount FROM fact_claim fc JOIN dim_provider dpr ON fc.provider_key = dpr.provider_key AND dpr.is_current = 1 GROUP BY dpr.display_name, dpr.specialty ORDER BY denial_count DESC

fewShots.question: Which providers are driving a specific denial reason?
fewShots.query: SELECT dpr.display_name, dpr.specialty, fc.primary_denial_reason, COUNT(*) as denied_claims, SUM(fc.billed_amount) as denied_dollars FROM fact_claim fc JOIN dim_provider dpr ON fc.provider_key = dpr.provider_key AND dpr.is_current = 1 WHERE fc.denial_flag = 1 GROUP BY dpr.display_name, dpr.specialty, fc.primary_denial_reason ORDER BY denied_claims DESC

fewShots.question: Give me patient names both male and female with their care manager
fewShots.query: SELECT CONCAT(dp.first_name, ' ', dp.last_name) AS patient_name, dp.gender, dpr.display_name AS care_manager, dpr.specialty FROM dim_patient dp JOIN fact_encounter fe ON dp.patient_key = fe.patient_key JOIN dim_provider dpr ON fe.provider_key = dpr.provider_key AND dpr.is_current = 1 WHERE dp.is_current = 1 ORDER BY dp.last_name

fewShots.question: Show me details for patient PAT0000001
fewShots.query: SELECT patient_id, first_name, last_name, date_of_birth, age, age_group, gender, city, state, zip_code, insurance_type, insurance_provider, is_current FROM dim_patient WHERE patient_id = 'PAT0000001' AND is_current = 1

fewShots.question: How many patients are in each age group?
fewShots.query: SELECT age_group, COUNT(*) as patient_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN gender = 'Male' THEN 1 END) as male_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN gender = 'Female' THEN 1 END) as female_count FROM dim_patient WHERE is_current = 1 GROUP BY age_group ORDER BY patient_count DESC

fewShots.question: Show me members who are non-adherent to their medications
fewShots.query: SELECT dp.first_name, dp.last_name, dp.age, dm.medication_name, dm.drug_class, ma.pdc_score, ma.adherence_category, ma.gap_days, ma.total_fills FROM agg_medication_adherence ma JOIN dim_patient dp ON ma.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 JOIN dim_medication dm ON ma.medication_key = dm.medication_key WHERE ma.adherence_category = 'Non-Adherent' ORDER BY ma.pdc_score ASC

fewShots.question: Show me medication adherence rates by drug class
fewShots.query: SELECT dm.drug_class, dm.therapeutic_area, COUNT(*) as member_medication_pairs, AVG(ma.pdc_score) as avg_pdc, SUM(CASE WHEN ma.adherence_category = 'Adherent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as adherent_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ma.adherence_category = 'Non-Adherent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as non_adherent_count, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN ma.adherence_category = 'Adherent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100 as adherence_rate_pct FROM agg_medication_adherence ma JOIN dim_medication dm ON ma.medication_key = dm.medication_key GROUP BY dm.drug_class, dm.therapeutic_area ORDER BY avg_pdc ASC

fewShots.question: How many patients are adherent vs non-adherent?
fewShots.query: SELECT adherence_category, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_key) as patient_count FROM agg_medication_adherence GROUP BY adherence_category ORDER BY patient_count DESC

fewShots.question: Which patients with chronic conditions are non-adherent to their medications?
fewShots.query: SELECT dp.first_name, dp.last_name, dp.age, dm.medication_name, dm.drug_class, ma.pdc_score, ma.adherence_category, ma.gap_days FROM agg_medication_adherence ma JOIN dim_patient dp ON ma.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 JOIN dim_medication dm ON ma.medication_key = dm.medication_key WHERE ma.is_chronic = 1 AND ma.adherence_category = 'Non-Adherent' ORDER BY ma.pdc_score ASC

fewShots.question: Show me prescription costs broken down by drug class
fewShots.query: SELECT dm.drug_class, dm.therapeutic_area, COUNT(*) as total_fills, SUM(fp.total_cost) as total_cost, SUM(fp.payer_paid) as payer_cost, SUM(fp.patient_copay) as patient_cost, AVG(fp.days_supply) as avg_days_supply FROM fact_prescription fp JOIN dim_medication dm ON fp.medication_key = dm.medication_key GROUP BY dm.drug_class, dm.therapeutic_area ORDER BY total_cost DESC

fewShots.question: Which patients have the highest prescription costs?
fewShots.query: SELECT TOP 20 dp.first_name, dp.last_name, dp.age, COUNT(*) as total_fills, SUM(fp.total_cost) as total_cost, SUM(fp.patient_copay) as total_copay FROM fact_prescription fp JOIN dim_patient dp ON fp.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 GROUP BY dp.first_name, dp.last_name, dp.age ORDER BY total_cost DESC

fewShots.question: What are the top diagnoses by volume?
fewShots.query: SELECT dd.icd_code, dd.icd_description, dd.icd_category, dd.is_chronic, COUNT(*) as diagnosis_count FROM fact_diagnosis fd JOIN dim_diagnosis dd ON fd.diagnosis_key = dd.diagnosis_key GROUP BY dd.icd_code, dd.icd_description, dd.icd_category, dd.is_chronic ORDER BY diagnosis_count DESC

fewShots.question: Which chronic conditions are most prevalent?
fewShots.query: SELECT dd.icd_code, dd.icd_description, dd.icd_category, COUNT(DISTINCT fd.patient_key) as unique_patients, COUNT(*) as diagnosis_count FROM fact_diagnosis fd JOIN dim_diagnosis dd ON fd.diagnosis_key = dd.diagnosis_key WHERE dd.is_chronic = 1 GROUP BY dd.icd_code, dd.icd_description, dd.icd_category ORDER BY unique_patients DESC

fewShots.question: Show me members living in high social vulnerability zip codes
fewShots.query: SELECT dp.first_name, dp.last_name, dp.age, dp.city, dp.zip_code, s.risk_tier, s.social_vulnerability_index, s.poverty_rate, s.food_desert_flag, s.transportation_score, s.median_household_income FROM dim_patient dp JOIN dim_sdoh s ON dp.zip_code = s.zip_code WHERE dp.is_current = 1 AND s.risk_tier = 'High' ORDER BY s.social_vulnerability_index DESC

fewShots.question: How does SDOH risk tier affect readmission risk?
fewShots.query: SELECT s.risk_tier as sdoh_risk_tier, COUNT(*) as total_encounters, AVG(fe.readmission_risk_score) as avg_risk_score, SUM(fe.readmission_flag) as actual_readmissions, CAST(SUM(fe.readmission_flag) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100 as readmission_rate_pct FROM fact_encounter fe JOIN dim_patient dp ON fe.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 JOIN dim_sdoh s ON dp.zip_code = s.zip_code GROUP BY s.risk_tier ORDER BY avg_risk_score DESC

fewShots.question: What is the average length of stay by encounter type?
fewShots.query: SELECT encounter_type, AVG(length_of_stay) as avg_length_of_stay, COUNT(*) as total_encounters, SUM(total_charges) as total_charges FROM fact_encounter GROUP BY encounter_type ORDER BY avg_length_of_stay DESC

fewShots.question: What is the average length of stay for high-risk vs low-risk patients?
fewShots.query: SELECT readmission_risk_category, AVG(length_of_stay) as avg_length_of_stay, COUNT(*) as total_encounters, AVG(readmission_risk_score) as avg_risk_score, SUM(total_charges) as total_charges FROM fact_encounter GROUP BY readmission_risk_category ORDER BY avg_length_of_stay DESC

fewShots.question: Which payers have the highest readmission rates?
fewShots.query: SELECT py.payer_name, py.payer_type, COUNT(*) as total_encounters, SUM(fe.readmission_flag) as readmissions, CAST(SUM(fe.readmission_flag) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) * 100 as readmission_rate_pct, AVG(fe.readmission_risk_score) as avg_risk_score FROM fact_encounter fe JOIN fact_claim fc ON fe.encounter_key = fc.encounter_key JOIN dim_payer py ON fc.payer_key = py.payer_key GROUP BY py.payer_name, py.payer_type ORDER BY readmission_rate_pct DESC

fewShots.question: Show me readmitted patients with their social risk and adherence data
fewShots.query: SELECT dp.first_name, dp.last_name, dp.zip_code, s.risk_tier as sdoh_risk, s.poverty_rate, s.social_vulnerability_index, fe.encounter_type, fe.readmission_risk_score, ma.pdc_score, ma.adherence_category, dm.drug_class FROM fact_encounter fe JOIN dim_patient dp ON fe.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 LEFT JOIN dim_sdoh s ON dp.zip_code = s.zip_code LEFT JOIN agg_medication_adherence ma ON dp.patient_key = ma.patient_key LEFT JOIN dim_medication dm ON ma.medication_key = dm.medication_key WHERE fe.readmission_flag = 1 ORDER BY fe.readmission_risk_score DESC

fewShots.question: Show me high-risk patients who are also medication non-adherent
fewShots.query: SELECT DISTINCT dp.first_name, dp.last_name, dp.age, fe.readmission_risk_score, fe.readmission_risk_category, ma.pdc_score, ma.adherence_category, dm.drug_class FROM fact_encounter fe JOIN dim_patient dp ON fe.patient_key = dp.patient_key AND dp.is_current = 1 JOIN agg_medication_adherence ma ON dp.patient_key = ma.patient_key JOIN dim_medication dm ON ma.medication_key = dm.medication_key WHERE fe.readmission_risk_category = 'High' AND ma.adherence_category = 'Non-Adherent' ORDER BY fe.readmission_risk_score DESC
